Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments") SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT 'departments' AS "__typename", "_root.r.files_aggregate"."files_aggregate" AS "files_aggregate", "_root.r.employees_aggregate"."employees_aggregate" AS "employees_aggregate") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."department_files" WHERE "department_id" = "_root.base"."id") SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'department_files_aggregate', 'aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'department_files_aggregate_fields', 'count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base")) AS "files_aggregate") AS "_root.r.files_aggregate" ON ('true') LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "department_id" = "_root.base"."id") SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'user_departments_aggregate', 'aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'user_departments_aggregate_fields', 'count', COUNT(*), 'max', json_build_object('role', MAX("role"), '__typename', 'user_departments_max_fields')) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT 'user_departments' AS "__typename", "_root.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root")) AS "employees_aggregate") AS "_root.r.employees_aggregate" ON ('true')) AS "_root")) AS "departments_aggregate"
